sentence: scrape the front page of a news website and email me a summary
error: Out-of-domain request compiled to a structurally-valid 2-stage spec from UNRELATED skills (status=compiled). lower() + governance gate validate STRUCTURE only; neither detects that IX has no scrape/email capability.
